title: Skyblock Customized
description: A pre-configured Hypixel Skyblock modpack for the newer minecraft versions! Comes with a list of all settings and changes for every update.
body:
**All use of modifications on Hypixel is at your own risk! [Hypixel Allowed Modifications](https://support.hypixel.net/hc/en-us/articles/6472550754962-Hypixel-Allowed-Modifications)**  
The modpack includes (as of version 1.6.4) In-Game Account Swithcer. If used, **NEVER** send the folder listed as "_IAS_ACCOUNTS_DO_NOT_SEND_TO_ANYONE" to ANYONE. If you do, they have information on how to secure your account, "[Stolen Accounts](https://github.com/The-Fireplace-Minecraft-Mods/In-Game-Account-Switcher/blob/main/docs/STOLEN.md)".  
**You should never store your accounts unencrypted.**

Skyblock Customized is a fully customized and pre-configured modpack designed to simplify the process of setting up mods for Hypixel Skyblock players on 1.21.5. It includes all essential settings pre-selected and documented in a sheet, offering a seamless, ready-to-use experience with everything needed for optimal gameplay right from the start. This project was created to save players the frustration and time of manual mod setup, given the recent Foraging Update, which has started pushing players to move to 1.21.5.

The google drive folder for the project can be found **[here](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1ofbpugc28pbnsBdGtMVMOsJxaNFwoJlS?usp=drive_link)**.  
The data sheet of all toggled settings in the most recent version can also be found in the google drive folder.

**Please respect individual mod licenses!**


<details>
<summary>Project Versioning</summary>

Project versions: x.y.z

(x) For large changes and releases
 
(y) For mod updates
 
(z) For setting updates

</details>
<details>
<summary>Modpack Setup Steps</summary>

How to fully set up the modpack:
1. Download and run the modpack

2. Customize your Minecraft settings

3. Open the skyblocker config menu in Mods -> Skyblocker -> Other Locations -> The rift

4. Input your McGrubber Stacks number. If you do not know what that is, leave it at 0.

5. When using the rift, go to Mods -> Skycubed -> Hidden action bar elements and turn on Mana.

6. Check the message remover under Mods -> Skycubed -> Chat -> Messages to clean. These messages get removed from chat. This section is set up using Regular expressions. https://regex101.com/ can be used to make more.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Custom Keybonds and Commands</summary>

/dh - warps to the Dungeon Hub

F1 while hovering on an item - Opens the wiki page for that item in your browser

F6 while hovering on an item - Searches the auction house or bazaar for the item

Middle mouse click on chat - Copy hovered message

Buttons in inventory are under Mods -> Skyblocker -> Quick Navigation

</details>
